participant_id.Description: Unique participant identifier matching entries in participants.tsv (format: sub-Damy###).

panas_positive_raw.Description: PANAS — Positive Affect total (current general affect-positive). Normative mean = 29.7, SD = 7.9; higher scores = more positive affect.

panas_negative_raw.Description: PANAS — Negative Affect total (current general affect-negative). Normative mean = 14.8, SD = 5.4; higher scores = more negative affect.
